description: Independent test vectors for CCP-15 (CCA, interference mitigation score=busy+PER*100, frequency agility, SF/EMA/load_factor/density test cases incl. density_estimate_high, sf_selection_low_density_capacity, snr_ema boundaries per table, load_factor overrides (0.5 vs 1.0 changing SF10->11), density rationale for SF10 default vs override, TDMA CCA, hash_32/select_channel/now() consistency with TDMA sfn per CCP-15.8.3). format_version=2. Mathematical oracles independent of impl per spec 02a-coordinated-capacity.md.

vectors.name: cca_threshold_clear
vectors.description: CCA/CAD clear if RSSI < threshold (-85 dBm).

vectors.name: frequency_agility_lowest_score
vectors.description: Select lowest interference channel (tie: lowest ch).

vectors.name: tdma_cca_pre_tx
vectors.description: TDMA TX preceded by CCA in guard; fail skips slot.

vectors.name: combined_mitigation_rebalance
vectors.description: Metrics trigger rebalance to alt ch+SF+slot.

vectors.name: hash_32_select_channel_now_consistency
vectors.description: hash_32(eui64 bytes,8) ^ (now()&0xFFFF) % N_CHANNELS per CCP-15.8.3 (crc32_ieee IEEE802.3 poly, little-endian, no crc16). TDMA sfn integration. Independent oracle.

vectors.name: snr_ema_boundary_sf10
vectors.description: snr_ema exactly at table boundary -15 selects SF10 (normative table in 02a:193).

vectors.name: snr_ema_boundary_sf11
vectors.description: snr_ema = -17.5 boundary selects SF11 per table.

vectors.name: load_factor_override_0.5
vectors.description: load_factor=0.5 does not override, keeps SF10 (test case 0.5 vs 1.0).

vectors.name: load_factor_override_1.0_sf11
vectors.description: load_factor=1.0 overrides SF10->11 per test case.

vectors.name: density_rationale_sf10_default
vectors.description: SF10 is default for typical density (8) per appendix-design-rationale.md; only overrides on extreme low/high density or load.

vectors.name: ema_snr_convergence_boundary
vectors.description: EMA alpha=1/4 convergence to boundary value matches rf_health.rs:231 impl for table-driven SF selection.

vectors.name: density_estimate_high
vectors.description: estimate_density(n=4, rssi=-55>-65, per=25) = (4*8)+(25*3)+20=127 > HIGH_DENSITY_THRESHOLD=8 per spec 02a:105. Triggers robustness SF bump.

vectors.name: sf_selection_low_density_capacity
vectors.description: density=1 < LOW_DENSITY_THRESHOLD=3, per=2<5, snr_ema=20>8 selects SF decrease for capacity (10->9) per adaptive_sf_select §2a.7.2 priority 2.
